---
title: "soundscapes-data-modeling"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Testing the SVM

```{r}
all_data$TYPE <- factor(
  all_data$TYPE,
  levels = c("Barren", "Macro_Forest")
)
```

```{r}
# SVM with the same JMP Parameters

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(kernlab)

BARREN_LABEL <- "Barren"
FOREST_LABEL <- "Macro_Forest"
predictors   <- c("ACI", "NDSI", "AEI", "ADI")
type_col     <- "TYPE"

# Prep data 
keep_rows  <- complete.cases(all_data[, c(predictors, type_col)])
model_data <- all_data[keep_rows, ]
model_data[[type_col]] <- factor(model_data[[type_col]],
                                  levels = c(BARREN_LABEL, FOREST_LABEL))

cat("Total rows used:", nrow(model_data), "\n")
cat("Class counts:\n")
print(table(model_data[[type_col]]))

# Train SVM (cost = C = 1, gamma = sigma = 0.25, RBF kernel)
svm_model <- ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI + AEI + ADI,
  data       = model_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  prob.model = TRUE,
  scaled     = TRUE
)

cat("\n--- Model Summary ---\n")
cat("Kernel:                   Radial Basis Function\n")
cat("Cost (C):                ", 1, "\n")
cat("Gamma (sigma):           ", 0.25, "\n")
cat("Number of Support Vectors:", svm_model@nSV, "\n")

# 3. Training predictions & confusion matrix 
train_pred <- predict(svm_model, newdata = model_data)
stopifnot(length(train_pred) == nrow(model_data))

conf_mat  <- table(Actual = model_data[[type_col]], Predicted = train_pred)
conf_rate <- prop.table(conf_mat, margin = 1)

cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Counts) ---\n")
print(conf_mat)
cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Predicted Rates) ---\n")
print(round(conf_rate, 3))

misclass_rate <- 1 - sum(diag(conf_mat)) / sum(conf_mat)
cat("\nMisclassification Rate:", round(misclass_rate, 7), "\n")
cat("(JMP reference:          0.2158539)\n")
```

```{r}
# PLOTS
  # Response Profile Plot (ACI vs NDSI decision boundary)
AEI_fixed <- mean(model_data$AEI, na.rm = TRUE)
ADI_fixed <- mean(model_data$ADI, na.rm = TRUE)

grid <- expand.grid(
  NDSI = seq(min(model_data$NDSI), max(model_data$NDSI), length.out = 150),
  ACI  = seq(min(model_data$ACI),  max(model_data$ACI),  length.out = 150)
) %>%
  mutate(AEI = AEI_fixed, ADI = ADI_fixed)

grid$pred_class <- as.character(predict(svm_model, newdata = grid))

p_profile <- ggplot(grid, aes(x = NDSI, y = ACI, fill = pred_class)) +
  geom_raster(interpolate = TRUE, alpha = 0.75) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Barren"       = "#F4CCCC",
               "Macro_Forest" = "#C9DAF8"),
    name   = "TYPE",
    labels = c("Barren"       = "TYPE = Barren",
               "Macro_Forest" = "TYPE = Macro_Forest")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Response Profile Plot",
    subtitle = paste0("AEI fixed at ", round(AEI_fixed, 4),
                      "  |  ADI fixed at ", round(ADI_fixed, 4)),
    x = "NDSI",
    y = "ACI"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

print(p_profile)

# Confusion matrix summary
cat("  Confusion Matrix Summary\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-15s  %-20s  %-20s  %-10s\n",
            "Actual", "Pred:Barren", "Pred:Forest", "Misclass"))
for (lv in c(BARREN_LABEL, FOREST_LABEL)) {
  rc <- conf_mat[lv, ]
  rr <- conf_rate[lv, ]
  cat(sprintf("  %-15s  %-20s  %-20s  %-10s\n",
              lv,
              paste0(rc[BARREN_LABEL], " (", round(rr[BARREN_LABEL], 3), ")"),
              paste0(rc[FOREST_LABEL], " (", round(rr[FOREST_LABEL], 3), ")"),
              round(1 - rr[lv], 3)))
}
cat(sprintf("\n  Overall Misclassification Rate: %.7f\n", misclass_rate))

# Probability Outputs
prob_all <- predict(svm_model, newdata = model_data, type = "probabilities")
model_data$prob_barren <- prob_all[, BARREN_LABEL]
model_data$prob_forest <- prob_all[, FOREST_LABEL]
model_data$gradient_score <- model_data$prob_barren  # 0 = forest, 1 = barren

# Habitat type bar plot
type_summary <- model_data %>%
  group_by(TYPE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prob_barren = mean(prob_barren),
    mean_prob_forest = mean(prob_forest),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(mean_prob_barren, mean_prob_forest),
    names_to  = "predicted_as",
    values_to = "mean_prob"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_as = if_else(predicted_as == "mean_prob_barren",
                           "Predicted to be urchin barrens",
                           "Predicted to be Macrocystis Forest"),
    TYPE_label = if_else(TYPE == BARREN_LABEL,
                         "Urchin Barrens",
                         "Macrocystis Forest")  
  )

p_jmp <- ggplot(jmp_summary,
                aes(x = TYPE_label, y = mean_prob, fill = predicted_as)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(mean_prob, 2)),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
            vjust = -0.4, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Predicted to be urchin barrens"     = "#B22222",
               "Predicted to be Macrocystis Forest" = "#4472C4"),
    labels = c("Predicted to be urchin barrens"     = "Predicted to be Urchin Barrens",
               "Predicted to be Macrocystis Forest" = expression("Predicted to be"~italic("Macrocystis")~"Forest")),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08)),
    name   = "Probability of assignment (SVM)"
  ) +
  xlab(NULL) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

print(p_jmp)

# Site-level mean gradient scores 
gradient_summary <- model_data %>%
  group_by(site, TYPE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_gradient_score = mean(gradient_score),
    se_gradient_score   = sd(gradient_score) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Clean site labels: replace _ with space, title case
    site_label = gsub("_", " ", site),
    site_label = tools::toTitleCase(site_label),
    # Clean TYPE labels for legend
    type_label = if_else(TYPE == BARREN_LABEL, "Urchin Barren", "Macrocystis Forest")
  )

# Legend labels with italics for Macrocystis using expression/parse
legend_labels <- c(
  "Urchin Barren"      = "Urchin Barren",
  "Macrocystis Forest" = "italic(Macrocystis)~Forest"
)

p_gradient <- ggplot(gradient_summary,
                     aes(x = reorder(site_label, mean_gradient_score),
                         y = mean_gradient_score,
                         fill = type_label)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_gradient_score - se_gradient_score,
        ymax = mean_gradient_score + se_gradient_score),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Urchin Barren"      = "firebrick3",
               "Macrocystis Forest" = "steelblue3"),
    name   = "TYPE",
    labels = c("Urchin Barren"      = "Urchin Barren",
               "Macrocystis Forest" = expression(italic("Macrocystis")~"Forest"))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
    name   = "Mean gradient score  (0 = forest  \u2192  1 = barren)"
  ) +
  xlab("Site") +
  ggtitle("Mean gradient score by site",
          subtitle = "Error bars = \u00B1 SE; dashed line = classification threshold") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))

print(p_gradient)
# Site level summary table
site_summary <- model_data %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  summarise(
    true_type           = first(TYPE),
    mean_gradient_score = mean(gradient_score),
    n_sequences         = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pred_class = if_else(mean_gradient_score >= 0.5, BARREN_LABEL, FOREST_LABEL),
    correct    = (true_type == pred_class)
  ) %>%
  arrange(mean_gradient_score)

cat("\n--- Site-Level Gradient Summary ---\n")
print(site_summary)

# Save plots
ggsave("svm_barplot.png",      plot = p_jmp,      width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 150)
ggsave("svm_response_profile.png", plot = p_profile,  width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 150)
ggsave("svm_gradient_scores.png",  plot = p_gradient, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 150)
cat("\nDone. Plots saved.\n")
```
